2024-11-05T08:19:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，清水灣道(往西貢方向)近牛池灣街市及熟食中心的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-11-05T08:35:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Clear Water Bay Road (Sai Kung bound) near Ngau Chi Wan Market and Cooked Food Centre which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-11-05T08:35:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的清水灣道(往西貢方向)近牛池灣街市及熟食中心的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-11-05T11:08:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of the junction of Man Yiu Street (Connaught Road Central bound) and Lung Wo Road  is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-11-05T11:08:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，民耀街(往干諾道中方向)和龍和道 交界的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-11-05T12:37:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle on fire , all lanes of Wai Yip Street (Kwun Tong bound) near Sheung Yuet Road are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
2024-11-05T12:37:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛着火，偉業街(往觀塘方向)近常悅道的全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-11-05T13:12:00.CONTENT_EN: All lanes of Wai Yip Street (Kwun Tong bound) near Sheung Yuet Road which was closed due to vehicle on fire is re-opened to all traffic.

2024-11-05T13:08:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Prince Edward Road West (Tai Kok Tsui bound) near Earl Street is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.

2024-11-05T13:39:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Prince Edward Road West (Tai Kok Tsui bound) near Earl Street which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-11-05T13:39:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的太子道西(往大角咀方向)近伯爵街的部份行車線現已解封。

description.NEAR_LANDMARK_EN: Tai Yuen Estate Tai Tak House

2024-11-05T13:27:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , all lanes of On Cheung Road (both bounds) near Tai Yuen Estate Tai Tak House are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
2024-11-05T13:27:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，安祥路(來回方向)近大元邨泰德樓的全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。
